summary: Phase 4 BUILD (run v2). HOME-FIRST per owner directive: the home page was upgraded before the rest of the build — Gazette-attributed press-quote block (citable GEO fact), one-location truth strip (links /location + /faq disambiguation), and visit-links to the new pages; interior style language preserved (owner rule). Then the full build: three new landings authored (open-late-cedar-rapids with call-to-confirm hours discipline, catering-cedar-rapids grounded in real party pans/family deals, location truth-assertion page), FAQ gained two disambiguation questions, footer gained three inbound links (orphan prevention). Build SUCCEEDED: 38/38 routes matching the approved Phase 2 matrix EXACTLY (missing [] / extra []), zero dangling links, zero slashless internal hrefs, calamari absent site-wide, open-late title carries no uncaveated hours claim. Graph-mode wire (existing KNOW-provenance graph; menu unchanged so 92 seeded Q&A stand). factory validate: EXIT 0 — zero gates, zero advisories (identity amended to real 2026-07-08: netlify.app domain + gmail + GA4 G-7W35DKNK6Z; 36 canonicals swapped). 93-asset library reused (no regeneration).
